description: FORK_A can be held by at most one philosopher at a time (shared between PHILOSOPHER_A and PHILOSOPHER_B)
FORK_B can be held by at most one philosopher at a time (shared between PHILOSOPHER_B and PHILOSOPHER_C)
FORK_C can be held by at most one philosopher at a time (shared between PHILOSOPHER_C and PHILOSOPHER_A)
PHILOSOPHER_A needs FORK_A (left) and FORK_C (right) simultaneously to eat
PHILOSOPHER_B needs FORK_B (left) and FORK_A (right) simultaneously to eat
PHILOSOPHER_C needs FORK_C (left) and FORK_B (right) simultaneously to eat
Each philosopher must pick up both forks before eating and put down both forks after eating
Classic circular wait: each philosopher holds left fork and waits for right fork (PHILOSOPHER_A holds FORK_A, PHILOSOPHER_B holds FORK_B, PHILOSOPHER_C holds FORK_C)
